title: Refresh README for Phase 1 reality and operator quickstart
problem: The root README still describes the repo as a Phase 0 scaffold and claims pipeline behavior is not implemented. It does not explain the fixture MVP run, mock-vs-live limitations, artifact paths, verification commands, public-site build, or safety boundaries. This makes the repo misleading for new engineers and external MVP review.
acceptance_criteria: README accurately describes the current Phase 1 MVP instead of Phase 0 scaffold status.
README includes fixture-mode quickstart commands for tests, safety audit, MVP run, and public-site build.
README clearly explains mock-only golden behavior, live-provider limitations, Ollama status, and where local env files belong.
README documents artifact paths and explains that fixture-mode runs should leave the repo clean after ticket-034.
README documents public-site safety boundaries and links to runtime config and safety docs.
No real secrets, API keys, local paths, private prompts, or generated artifacts are committed.
non_goals: Do not implement live Ollama or cloud providers.
Do not change runtime pipeline behavior.
Do not change public export schema.
Do not add secrets or local-only values.
Do not implement ticket-036 or later.
